card.name: Ramon Berrios
card.title: Founder
card.relationship_to_me: Freelance client and close collaborator. Founder of Gemz (influencer marketing SaaS) via Wynami Inc. Pays Sanchay for technical work. Very active working relationship with regular 1:1 calls and daily WhatsApp exchanges.
card.one_paragraph_summary: Freelance client and close collaborator. Founder of Gemz (influencer marketing SaaS) via Wynami Inc. Pays Sanchay for technical work. Very active working relationship with regular 1:1 calls and daily WhatsApp exchanges. · Intense working collaboration — live debugging sessions, screen recording sharing, investigation into suspicious Slack/GitHub activity, and product coordination for Gemz

interactions.summary: Ramon forwarded a Gemz onboarding email test to Sanchay for review and QA
Regular 1:1 video calls via Google Meet, roughly weekly from Feb-Mar 2026, coordinating across IST and US timezones
Intense working collaboration — live debugging sessions, screen recording sharing, investigation into suspicious Slack/GitHub activity, and product coordination for Gemz
